# Sabuj Bandopadhyay — Documentation Problem-Solver

> Sabuj Bandopadhyay is a documentation problem-solver and builder with 10+ years in technical
> writing, API documentation, and knowledge management, and 3+ years leading documentation. He runs
> product documentation like a product — pairing docs-as-code, AI, and automation to lower support
> cost, speed up engineering, and grow product adoption. He is a hands-on leader (a "player-coach")
> who personally owns features as the writer while also leading a team, makes decisions from data,
> and is open to both lead individual-contributor and people-leadership roles. Current role:
> Documentation Manager at Chargebee.

## About
- Name: Sabuj Bandopadhyay
- Headline: Documentation Problem-Solver — docs-as-code, AI-powered documentation, developer experience
- Identity: builder and problem-solver; hands-on leader; data-driven; flexible across lead-IC and leadership roles
- Location: Bengaluru, India
- LinkedIn: https://in.linkedin.com/in/sabujbandopadhyay
- Email: sbtechwriter@gmail.com
- Portfolio site: https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/

## Key achievements (problem → what was built → ROI)
- Built autonomous AI agents that analyze new & existing support tickets in bulk to proactively fix documentation gaps — lowering ticket volume and front-line support cost.
- Built a documentation CLI (OpenAPI generation, scaffolding, sync, validation, preview) so engineers contribute docs — 79% of API doc PRs now come from non-docs engineers, with the contributor base nearly doubled and no added headcount.
- Built multiple AI skills that draft and update feature docs from any source (Notion, Google Docs, PDF, Jira) — cutting publishing time by more than 50%.
- Runs a sustained pipeline publishing 30+ how-to and concept videos every month — speeding feature onboarding and prospect evaluation.
- Migrated 1,800+ knowledge-base articles into docs — engagement +12%, page views more than doubled (58K+), copy-fix requests down 45%, 95% style compliance.
- Automated release notes and changelogs — cut effort from ~8 hours to ~15 minutes and made API docs the single source of truth.
- Established a PM-as-first-drafter publishing model — documentation SLA reduced by ~50%.

## Detailed pages
- [Impact](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/impact.html): outcomes as problem → build → ROI, and the AI documentation loop.
- [Work &amp; Artifacts](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/work.html): real published documentation he and his team ship at Chargebee, plus video walkthroughs.
- [How I work](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/approach.html): docs-as-code, strategy & governance, continuous audits, data, revenue, video, contribution, cross-functional collaboration, developer-experience perspective.
- [Vision](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/vision.html): docs as the backbone of AI; signal-driven proactive docs; docs that prove their ROI.
- [Leadership](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/leadership.html): hands-on leadership, data-driven decisions, coaching, growth paths, advocacy, fixing problems at the root.
- [Experience](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/experience.html): full career timeline, education, and featured public work.
- [Skills](https://sabuj000.github.io/Portfolio/skills.html): tools & stack with context.

## Leadership & working style
- Hands-on "player-coach": personally writes and owns features (user docs, API references, any content the feature needs) while leading a team.
- Data-driven: tracks performance monthly and compares month-over-month and quarter-over-quarter to decide concrete next actions.
- Communicates up with structured weekly updates; delegates ownership; coaches before key moments; defines team growth paths; advocates for the team; fixes the root cause when contributions get rejected.
- Collaborates cross-functionally with Product, Go-to-Market, Marketing, Support, Engineering, Design, and Developer Experience.

## Skills & tools
- Documentation & docs-as-code: Markdown, MDX, Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD, OpenAPI, Postman, docs CLIs & automation.
- AI & automation: prompt engineering, custom GPTs, AI skills, AI agents, Claude, GPT, Cursor, AI-ready/LLM-friendly content for in-product assistants and MCP-based tools.
- Analytics: GA4, Pendo, FullStory, Looker Studio, Splunk, AI/LLM-crawl analytics.
- Visual, media & process: Mermaid, Figma, Camtasia, Trainn, SnagIt, ISO standards, document control, accessibility.
- Code & markup: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript (working), JSON, XML.

## Experience
- Chargebee — Documentation Manager (Apr 2023–present); Senior Technical Writer (Jan 2022–Apr 2023); Technical Writer (Aug 2021–Dec 2021).
- Capillary Technologies — Technical Writer (Aug 2020–Aug 2021).
- Netradyne — Technical Writer (Apr 2019–Jul 2020).
- Alternative Minds — Technical Writer (May 2017–Apr 2019).
- FreeBalance — QA Tester (Sep 2014–Apr 2017).

## Education
- MCA, Information Technology — West Bengal University of Technology, Kolkata (2009–2012).
- BCA, Information Technology — West Bengal University of Technology, Kolkata (2006–2009).
